blocked_parameters.description: Map of cmdlet/binary pattern (* = all commands) to parameter names (without leading -) that must never appear.

network_fetch_commands.description: Command names (case-insensitive) treated as network-capable; string literals are scanned for http(s) URLs.

network_fetch_domains.description: Allowed URI hosts when a network_fetch_command is used (case-insensitive). Empty list denies all remote URLs for those commands.
